title: Auth0 vs FullStory
description: Compare Auth0 vs FullStory — a security & compliance platform versus a analytics & data solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: Auth0 (Security & Compliance) and FullStory (Analytics & Data) serve different primary purposes. Auth0 has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is security & compliance or analytics & data capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Auth0 and FullStory?
faqs.answer: Auth0 is a security & compliance tool, while FullStory is a analytics & data platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can Auth0 replace FullStory?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, Auth0 or FullStory?
faqs.answer: Auth0 ($23-75/mo) and FullStory ($99/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
